infeasible_scenarios.scenarios: Never extract from :hover / never use dark mode colours
infeasible_scenarios.reasoning: Testing these extraction anti-patterns requires the agent to actively run a live browser session and inspect computed styles on a real site. The eval sandbox has no pre-configured live site and no way to observe what colour values getComputedStyle returns. No reliable graded artifact can be produced.

infeasible_scenarios.scenarios: Stage 4 visual diff iteration loop (aim for <10% mismatch)
infeasible_scenarios.reasoning: Stage 4 requires agent-browser diff against a running local dev server and a live target URL. The eval sandbox has no pre-built React project to run and no live site to compare against. The iteration loop cannot be executed or meaningfully graded from output files alone.
